title: Default Item Page should ACTUALLY become the default item page
excerpt:
Description
When clicking a link to a specific item, the item page view opens. 
However, it always goes to the Updates tab and not to the actual default tab. The default tab should always be the opening tab. 
What are yo…

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When clicking a link to a specific item, the item page view opens.
However, it always goes to the Updates tab and not to the actual default tab. The default tab should always be the opening tab.

What are you trying to achieve

When clicking a link to a specific item, the item page view opens.
However, it always goes to the Updates tab and not to the actual default tab. The default tab should always be the opening tab.
